dict.string: This application makes use of the following third party libraries:

Copyright (c) 2014-2022 Alamofire Software Foundation (http://alamofire.org/)
Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"), to deal in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions:
The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in all copies or substantial portions of the Software.
THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.

Copyright (c) 2017 Arthur Sahakyan
Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"), to deal in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions:
The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in all copies or substantial portions of the Software.
THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.

JxCameraSDK Free Commercial License Agreement / 免费商业许可协议 Copyright (c) 2025 JEILIN Technology Co., Ltd.
本 SDK 免费提供给第三方应用集成使用，包括商业及非商业用途，但需遵守以下条款。
1. Grant of License / 授权许可 JEILIN Technology Co., Ltd. grants you a non-exclusive, non-transferable, non-sublicensable license to integrate the binary form of the JxCameraSDK (“Software”) into your applications for interacting with JEILIN camera devices.
JEILIN Technology Co., Ltd. 授予您非独占、不可转让、不可再许可的权利， 允许您将 JxCameraSDK（“软件”）二进制集成到应用中，用于控制和访问 JEILIN 摄像设备。
2. Restrictions / 使用限制 You may NOT / 您不得： - reverse engineer, decompile, disassemble, or modify the Software; 反向工程、反编译、反汇编或修改软件； - redistribute, resell, sublicense, or expose the Software as an SDK, API, library, or developer tool; 以 SDK、API、库或开发工具形式重新分发、转售或提供； - remove, obscure, or alter any proprietary notices; 删除、隐藏或修改任何所有权声明； - use the Software to create competing camera SDKs, developer tools, frameworks, or related products. 使用本软件开发竞品摄像 SDK、工具、框架或相关产品。
3. Ownership / 所有权 The Software is licensed, not sold. All rights, title, and interest remain the exclusive property of JEILIN Technology Co., Ltd.
软件为许可使用，而非出售。所有权、权利及利益均归 JEILIN Technology Co., Ltd. 所有。
4. Third-Party Open Source Components / 第三方开源组件 This Software may include or depend on third-party open-source components distributed under their respective licenses (MIT, BSD, Apache 2.0, LGPL, etc.). JEILIN Technology Co., Ltd. does not claim ownership of these components. You must comply with the applicable open-source licenses for those components. A list of included third-party licenses is provided in: THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.txt
本软件可能包含或依赖第三方开源组件，遵循各自许可证（MIT、BSD、Apache 2.0、LGPL 等）。 JEILIN Technology Co., Ltd. 不对这些组件主张所有权。 您在使用时必须遵守相应的开源协议。第三方开源许可清单见：THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.txt
5. Disclaimer of Warranty / 免责声明 THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED “AS IS”, WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY OF ANY KIND. YOUR USE OF THE SOFTWARE IS AT YOUR SOLE RISK.
软件按“原样”提供，不附带任何形式的明示或暗示担保。 使用风险由用户自行承担。
6. Limitation of Liability / 责任限制 IN NO EVENT SHALL JEILIN TECHNOLOGY CO., LTD. BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, EXEMPLARY, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, INCLUDING LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, OR BUSINESS INTERRUPTION.
在任何情况下，JEILIN Technology Co., Ltd. 对任何间接、偶发、特殊、示例性或衍生损失不承担责任，包括利润损失、数据丢失或业务中断。
7. Termination / 终止 Any violation of this license results in immediate termination. Upon termination, you must cease all use of the Software and delete all copies.
任何违反本协议条款的行为将导致许可自动终止。 许可终止后，必须停止使用软件并删除所有副本。
8. Governing Law / 适用法律 This agreement shall be governed by and construed under the laws of the jurisdiction in which JEILIN Technology Co., Ltd. is legally registered.
本协议受 JEILIN Technology Co., Ltd. 注册地法律管辖并按其解释。
-------------------------------------------------------------
For inquiries or business licensing, please contact: JEILIN Technology Co., Ltd. Email: jeilintechsz@gmail.com
